_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning strategies to become a smart consumer, including how to identify and avoid financial scams.

_source.w: We are learning strategies to become a smart consumer, including how to identify and avoid financial scams.
y: Smart consumer skills protect our money and help us get the best value for our purchases.
Scams are becoming more sophisticated — knowing how to spot them protects us and our families.
These practical skills will serve us every day for the rest of our lives.
eg: Identifying the warning signs of common financial scams — phishing emails, fake websites, too-good-to-be-true offers.
Practising comparison shopping and evaluating products based on quality, price, and reviews.
Investigating how to verify whether an online business is legitimate before making a purchase.
Discussing the importance of reading terms and conditions before agreeing to a service.
Analysing a real scam example and identifying how consumers could have protected themselves.
Creating a 'smart consumer checklist' that we can use when making purchasing decisions.
